## Security Checklist
- [ ] No secrets or credentials committed
- [ ] Input validation applied to all new endpoints
- [ ] Authorization checks in place for new endpoints
- [ ] No new SQL injection, XSS or injection vulnerabilities introduced
- [ ] Dependencies added/updated are reviewed (no known CVEs)
- [ ] Sensitive data is not logged

## Testing
- [ ] Unit tests added/updated
- [ ] Integration tests added/updated (if applicable)
- [ ] Tested locally — feature works as expected
- [ ] All existing tests pass (`mvn verify`)
